title: Origins: Mantidicae
description: An origin that thrives with flower power.
body:
# 🥀Mantidicae **(Impact 2 Origin)** *Mantes who utilized a symbiotic connection with orchids to become humanoid, and now use the flower's pollen as their lifeblood.* ## • Powerlist •
🪷 Orchid Aura Your abilities are fueled by the pollen of orchids. Stand in/nearby a blue orchid or potted orchids to gain Aura over time. Alternatively, you can consume them to get a little Aura.
Info Your hunger increases when you gain Aura from consuming orchids, and it will passively fill over time at maximum Aura.
🌻 Blooming You can expend some Aura to duplicate orchids.
Info Sneak and Use placed orchids to duplicate them.
🦗 Fluttering Hindwings Your fall is slowed while you have Aura.
👻 Cryptic Mimicry Sneaking when nearby orchids will allow you to turn invisible.
Info Landing attacks while invisible will inflict your opponent with Entranced. This will award Aura based on the damage you deal when you apply this effect.
🌀 Petal Portal: Primary Ability You can instantly relocate to an orchid in your vision, at the cost of Aura.
🌺 Whispering Wings: Secondary Ability You can slightly dash forward upon activation, and you can dash a second time if you activate just after dashing once. Each dash takes Aura; the second taking more but propelling you further.
Info Coming into contact with an orchid while dashing will instantly replenish both dashes, allowing you to create ladders or roads with orchids.
🌸 Sliced Petal Being attacked will remove Aura based on the damage you took, and being attacked while using Cryptic Mimicry will deplete substantially more.
👑 Uncrowned Having no Aura will double your damage intake.
🫒 Driven You naturally get less nutrients from food.
🛏️ Germination You spawn with a singular blue orchid.
Info You find flower pots in your rest, up to 4 each time you sleep.
😵‍💫 Entranced: Appliable Effect This effect will cause the afflicted to briefly be unable to see any nearby entities, and lasts for 4 seconds.
## • Additional • This origin was part of the 2024 Pollen Party Jam!
